chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Bail Appln. No. S – 525 of 2024 Cr. Bail Appln. No. S – 534 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of bail application 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of bail application. 17.10.2024 Mr. Imtiaz Ali Abbasi, Advocate for the Applicants in both the bail applications Mr. Shafi Muhammad Mahar, DPG for the State >>>>>..<<<<< Applicants are present in Court on interim pre-arrest bail. Learned counsel for the applicants while placing on record certified copy of judgment dated 26.09.2024 passed by Additional Sessions Judge, Pano Akil in Sessions Case No.368/2024 (Re- The State vs. Shahmir and others) and submits that the applicants have been acquitted of the charge, therefore, under instructions, he does not press these bail applications. Accordingly, the same are dismissed as not pressed. Office to place a signed copy of this order in the captioned connected matter. Judge ARBROHI
